description_long: This house features a striking modern design with a large, angular sloped roof that dominates its profile. The exterior is primarily finished in white and gray, with extensive use of glass for large windows and sliding doors, creating a bright and open appearance. The structure is two stories tall, with the upper level partially cantilevered over the lower, adding architectural interest and shade. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with some sections featuring floor-to-ceiling glass panels and others more modestly sized. The main entryway is centrally located, accessed by a short set of steps and sheltered by the overhanging roof. Minimalist lines and a lack of decorative elements emphasize the contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern two-story house with a dramatic sloped roof, large asymmetrical windows, and a minimalist white and gray exterior.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the main entryway with steps, large glass panels, and the prominent sloped roof overhang.
description_view_1: This side view shows the depth of the roof overhang and the asymmetrical window arrangement along the facade.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals additional large windows and sliding doors, as well as the cantilevered upper story.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays a simpler facade with fewer windows and a circular feature, emphasizing the house's geometric lines.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, minimal overhang, and large glass panels; no porch or decorative columns.
